packs.name: Fortnite Style
packs.prompt:
Use the provided photo as the highest-priority facial reference. Preserve Rafa Franco's identity exactly — the viewer must instantly recognize him. Keep his exact hairstyle, facial proportions, beard shadow, eyebrows, eye shape, nose, lips, jawline, skin texture, facial asymmetry, and all unique facial characteristics. Rafa Franco must remain completely photorealistic while being naturally integrated into the Fortnite universe.
Create an epic Victory Royale celebration scene showing Rafa Franco celebrating alongside his Fortnite squad after winning the match. Rafa occupies the center of the composition and is the undeniable focal point, standing slightly ahead of the group in a confident, victorious pose. The camera uses a wide-angle cinematic perspective that captures both the celebration and the Fortnite environment, while keeping Rafa dominant in the frame.
Several iconic Fortnite characters are positioned around him, performing popular Fortnite victory emotes and dances, creating a fun, energetic, and triumphant atmosphere without stealing focus from Rafa. Massive colorful fireworks explode across the sky above the squad, filling the scene with vibrant bursts of light, glowing particles, sparks, and celebratory effects. The entire group is illuminated by dynamic colorful lighting generated by the fireworks, creating beautiful reflections and highlights on the characters and surroundings.
The Fortnite island environment stretches behind the squad with visible mountains, forests, rivers, cities, and iconic landmarks bathed in warm evening light. Floating confetti, glowing victory particles, and subtle environmental details enhance the festive atmosphere.
The composition should feel like the final victorious moment of an official Fortnite season trailer, capturing excitement, friendship, achievement, and celebration. Dynamic poses, realistic depth, cinematic lighting, atmospheric perspective, volumetric effects, and vibrant Fortnite colors create a visually stunning scene.
Official Fortnite Chapter promotional artwork style, Fortnite loading screen quality, Unreal Engine 5 rendering, AAA game quality, professional key art illustration, masterpiece composition, ultra-detailed textures, 8K resolution, legendary Victory Royale celebration, epic squad energy, maximum visual impact, premium promotional poster quality.
